name: Goofy aah Neighborhood War - Neighborhood Wars
description:
"BRO STOP SPAWN CAMPING!!" - Some Angry kid that sucks at the game

Basically a RPG about that Roblox game (that unfortunatly was banned) called "Neighborhood Wars"

You can choose any weapon at your choice.

You will be part of the Yellow Team, a Team where they are Unhinged. Cracking jokes while reloading and Possibly allergic to self-preservation.

Tags: Roblox, Robloxian, RPG, Criminality, The Hood, Neighborhood Wars, Guns
creator: TINKYTUBBIE
